text:
まさか、地球の様子を見に来た矢先に
このような事に巻き込まれるとはな。
久々の再会だっていうのに、ねっ！

すまない、リナ。
巻き込んでしまって。

いまさら、そんなの言いっこなしよ。
それよりほら、まだ来るわ！

わかってる。
……だが、間に合ったようだ。
最強の増援がな。

Good grief--to think this had to happen right as we were
about to go check up on Earth.
Just when we were finally getting to see each other again!

Apologies, Rina. We didn't mean to
drag you into it.

That's all water under the bridge now.
ESPECIALLY now--we've got company!

Understood. But at least we made it in time...
with the strongest reinforcements available.
